title: Publishing to PyPI with a Trusted Publisher
desc: Official PyPI documentation on setting up trusted publishing.

title: LiteLLM supply-chain compromise via leaked PyPI credentials
desc: Attacker used leaked API token to push malicious releases. Trusted publishing would have prevented this.

title: Ultralytics supply-chain attack via compromised GitHub Actions
desc: Workflow injection led to malicious PyPI uploads. TP alone wouldn't have prevented this but narrows the attack surface.
